title: Remove the runtime lock
body:
This primarily served to protect us against shutting down the Libpod runtime while operations (like creating a container) were happening. However, it was very inconsistently implemented (a lot of our longer-lived functions, like pulling images, just didn't implement it at all...) and I'm not sure how much we really care about this very-specific error case?

Removing it also removes a lot of potential deadlocks, which is nice.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]
